Card1.Title: Supervisor
Card1.Description: Monitors activity to identify project roadblocks.

Card2.Title: Team Builder
Card2.Description: Scans your talent network to create the optimal team for each project.

Card3.Title: Karma
Card3.Description: Regularly evaluates quality and helps keep standards high.

Card4.Title: Calculator
Card4.Description: Uses data from past projects to provide better delivery estimates.
